info.name: Production-Ready Backend API System
info.description:
This collection provides a comprehensive overview of the Production-Ready Backend API System by covering its core authentication, authorization, profile, and administrative user management capabilities. It is designed to support functional validation of key user lifecycle flows, including registration, login, token refresh, logout, profile retrieval, and privileged admin operations.

The collection is structured to reflect both standard application behavior and security-focused validation. Alongside primary success-path requests, it includes negative and edge-case scenarios such as missing, invalid, tampered, or insufficiently privileged tokens. This helps ensure the API is not only operational, but also resilient in enforcing access control, session integrity, and error handling.

Overall, this collection serves as a practical resource for validating backend readiness, testing protected routes, verifying role-based access behavior, and maintaining confidence in the reliability and security of the system’s user-facing and admin-facing endpoints.
